description_long: This is a compact, square-shaped handbag with a structured form and a prominent, curved handle attached at the top. The front flap is adorned with a decorative button or clasp and features a subtle, perforated or stitched pattern that adds visual interest. The main body of the bag appears to be made from a textured, possibly woven or faux-leather material in a muted greenish hue, while the handle is a lighter, slightly contrasting color. The back of the bag is plain, with a consistent texture and no visible pockets or embellishments. The overall design is minimalist yet elegant, suitable for casual or semi-formal urban settings. The bag is small enough to be carried by hand or on the forearm, making it ideal for personal items.
description: A small, structured square handbag with a curved top handle, decorative front flap, and subtle stitched detailing in muted green tones.
description_view_0: Side view showing the slim profile and the curved handle extending above the main body.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the decorative flap with a button or clasp and stitched pattern.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the slim profile and handle as in view 0.
description_view_3: Back view displaying a plain, textured surface with no visible embellishments.
attribute_strap_type: Single short, rigid handle attached at the top, suitable for hand or forearm carrying; not adjustable.
attribute_closure_mechanism: Front flap with a central button or clasp closure.
attribute_decorative_elements: Decorative button or clasp on the front flap; subtle stitched or perforated pattern on the flap.
attribute_pattern: Subtle stitched or perforated pattern on the front flap; otherwise plain.
